name: SanQi
author: L. Lynn Smith (c. 2003); AGP module
description: The Game of Three: both players share three piece types (the Lingqijing characters Shang 上, Zhong 中, Xia 下), placing one anywhere or converting a surrounded piece by local majority. First wins with a circle of six alike, Second with a line of six, either with a triangle of six — at the end of their own turn. By L. Lynn Smith; Shared Pieces design-competition entry, featured in Abstract Games #17.
